facebook.content_angle: Suit care as a performance investment — practical tips to protect Italian competition swimwear and maintain its technical properties race after race
facebook.post_text:
Your suit works as hard as you do. Are you looking after it? 🏊‍♂️

Chlorine is your competition suit's biggest enemy. Every session without a rinse degrades the fabric fibres that create compression, reduce drag, and keep you fast.

Three habits that protect your investment:
→ Rinse in cold fresh water immediately after every swim
→ Hand wash gently — never machine wash or wring
→ Rotate between two suits so each one fully dries between sessions 👌

**A well-cared-for Italian competition suit performs at its peak race after race.**

Our Velocx suits are built to last — but only if you give them the care they deserve.

Shop the range at VelocxNZ.co.nz
